title: What a busy week.
markdown:
Did volunteer event at food \& friends. Took son to fun festival at his school. Took son to Clarendon Day. Took son to volunteer seed gathering event, which turned out to be a joint UUCA and ACE event. Went to Ren Faire in Maryland. Went to Critical Mass UU book club. I went to a games night. I went to the Gym. I went to a meet up event at Arlington Draft Movie Company.


It’s no wonder I’ve only written 1500, but now I have a better idea of where my story is going, so it should pick up speed.


And I’ve gone from having nightmares to have pleasant dreams. Now I need to plan out the next week.


\[Interestingly, this is not my usual behavior\-\-if left to my own devices, I'd putter around the apartment indefinately.]
